_doc: SRD 5.2.1 feats. Categories: origin (chosen via background, available at L1), general (replace an ASI from L4+), fighting_style (granted by class features), epic_boon (L19 ASI substitute). Summaries paraphrase SRD 5.2.1 mechanics (CC-BY; see /disclaimer).

feats.label: Alert
feats.summary: Add proficiency bonus to initiative; grant initiative bonus to an ally; can swap initiative with an ally.

feats.label: Crafter
feats.summary: Proficient with three artisan's tools; 20% discount on equipment; faster crafting.

feats.label: Healer
feats.summary: Healer's-kit use restores 1d6 + PB HP; bonus action stabilises with 1 HP.

feats.label: Lucky
feats.summary: Luck Points = PB; spend to add advantage on a d20 test or impose disadvantage on an attack vs you.

feats.label: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
feats.summary: Learn 2 cleric cantrips and one 1st-level cleric spell castable 1/long rest.

feats.label: Magic Initiate (Druid)
feats.summary: Learn 2 druid cantrips and one 1st-level druid spell castable 1/long rest.

feats.label: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
feats.summary: Learn 2 wizard cantrips and one 1st-level wizard spell castable 1/long rest.

feats.label: Musician
feats.summary: Proficient with three musical instruments; grant Heroic Inspiration to allies after a long rest.

feats.label: Savage Attacker
feats.summary: Once per turn: reroll a melee weapon's damage dice and use either total.

feats.label: Skilled
feats.summary: Proficiency in three skills or tools (any combination).

feats.label: Tavern Brawler
feats.summary: Reroll 1 on unarmed/improvised damage; bonus-action grapple after unarmed hit; +1 STR or CON.

feats.label: Tough
feats.summary: Maximum HP increases by 2 per character level.

feats.label: Ability Score Improvement
feats.summary: Increase one ability by 2 or two abilities by 1, max 20.

feats.label: Athlete
feats.summary: +1 STR or DEX; standing up costs 5 ft; climb at full speed; running long jump after 5-ft run.

feats.label: Charger
feats.summary: After Dash, attack with +1d8 damage or push the target 10 ft.

feats.label: Chef
feats.summary: +1 CON or WIS; cook food restoring HP; bake treats granting temp HP.

feats.label: Crossbow Expert
feats.summary: Ignore loading on crossbows; no disadv at 5 ft; bonus-action hand-crossbow attack.

feats.label: Defensive Duelist
feats.summary: Reaction: add PB to AC against a melee attack while wielding a finesse weapon.

feats.label: Dual Wielder
feats.summary: +1 AC while two-weapon fighting; draw two weapons in one action; off-hand needn't be light.

feats.label: Durable
feats.summary: +1 CON; spend HD on short rest restores at least 2×(CON mod, min 1) HP.

feats.label: Elemental Adept
feats.summary: Spells of chosen element ignore resistance; treat 1s on damage dice as 2s.

feats.label: Fey Touched
feats.summary: Learn Misty Step + a 1st-level divination/enchantment spell, cast each 1/long rest.

feats.label: Grappler
feats.summary: Advantage on attacks vs creatures you grapple; can pin a grapple.

feats.label: Great Weapon Master
feats.summary: Crit/kill with heavy melee → bonus-action attack; +PB damage with heavy weapons.

feats.label: Heavy Armor Master
feats.summary: +1 STR; reduce bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage by 2 in heavy armor.

feats.label: Inspiring Leader
feats.summary: 10-min speech grants 6 allies temp HP = level + CHA.

feats.label: Keen Mind
feats.summary: +1 INT; perfect direction sense; recall recent events accurately.

feats.label: Lightly Armored
feats.summary: +1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with light armor and shields.

feats.label: Mage Slayer
feats.summary: Reaction: melee attack vs caster within 5 ft; advantage on saves vs spells from creatures within 5 ft.

feats.label: Magic Initiate (General)
feats.summary: Learn 2 cantrips + 1st-level spell from any class list, castable 1/long rest.

feats.label: Martial Adept
feats.summary: Learn 2 maneuvers; gain 1 superiority die (d6).

feats.label: Medium Armor Master
feats.summary: Medium armor doesn't impose stealth disadv; allow up to +3 DEX.

feats.label: Mobile
feats.summary: +10 ft speed; Dash through difficult terrain at full speed; melee attack negates OAs from target this turn.

feats.label: Mounted Combatant
feats.summary: Advantage vs unmounted smaller targets while mounted; redirect attacks vs mount; mount takes 0 dmg on save.

feats.label: Observant
feats.summary: +1 INT or WIS; +5 to passive Perception/Investigation; lip-read.

feats.label: Polearm Master
feats.summary: Bonus-action butt-end attack (1d4); OAs trigger on entering reach.

feats.label: Resilient
feats.summary: +1 in chosen ability; gain saving-throw proficiency in that ability.

feats.label: Ritual Caster
feats.summary: Acquire a ritual book; cast known rituals from any class.

feats.label: Sentinel
feats.summary: OAs reduce target speed to 0; OAs even when target Disengages; reaction-attack when ally within 5 ft is hit.

feats.label: Shadow Touched
feats.summary: Learn Invisibility + a 1st-level illusion/necromancy spell, cast each 1/long rest.

feats.label: Sharpshooter
feats.summary: Long-range no disadv; ignore half/three-quarters cover; -PB attack for +PB damage with ranged weapons.

feats.label: Shield Master
feats.summary: Bonus-action shield shove; +shield AC to DEX saves; reaction: 0 damage on a successful DEX save.

feats.label: Skill Expert
feats.summary: +1 chosen ability; gain proficiency in a skill; gain expertise in a proficient skill.

feats.label: Skulker
feats.summary: Hide when lightly obscured; missing with a ranged attack doesn't reveal you; no disadv on Perception in dim light.

feats.label: Slasher
feats.summary: +1 STR or DEX; slashing damage reduces target speed by 10 ft; on crit, impose disadv on attacks.

feats.label: Speedy
feats.summary: +10 ft speed; OAs miss after a Dash; ignore difficult terrain when Dashing.

feats.label: Spell Sniper
feats.summary: Spell attack range doubles; ignore half/three-quarters cover; learn an attack-roll cantrip.

feats.label: Telekinetic
feats.summary: Learn Mage Hand (invisible); bonus action to shove a creature 5 ft.

feats.label: Telepathic
feats.summary: Speak telepathically within 60 ft; cast Detect Thoughts 1/long rest.

feats.label: War Caster
feats.summary: Advantage on concentration saves; cast somatic spells with hands full; OAs can use a spell.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Archery
feats.summary: +2 to ranged weapon attack rolls.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Defense
feats.summary: +1 AC while wearing armor.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Dueling
feats.summary: +2 damage with one-handed melee weapons when no other weapon is held.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Great Weapon Fighting
feats.summary: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice with two-handed/versatile weapons used two-handed.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Protection
feats.summary: Reaction: impose disadv on an attack vs an ally within 5 ft using your shield.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Two-Weapon
feats.summary: Add ability mod to off-hand attack damage.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Blind Fighting
feats.summary: Blindsight 10 ft.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Thrown Weapon
feats.summary: +2 damage with thrown weapons; draw thrown weapon as part of attack.

feats.label: Fighting Style: Unarmed
feats.summary: Unarmed strikes deal 1d6; bonus-action grapple.

feats.label: Boon of Combat Prowess
feats.summary: Once per turn: turn a missed attack into a hit.

feats.label: Boon of Dimensional Travel
feats.summary: Bonus action: teleport up to 30 ft, PB times per long rest.

feats.label: Boon of Energy Resistance
feats.summary: Resistance to two damage types of your choice.

feats.label: Boon of Fate
feats.summary: Reaction: replace a creature's d20 with your own roll, PB times per long rest.

feats.label: Boon of Fortitude
feats.summary: +40 max HP; spend a HD as a reaction to regain HP.

feats.label: Boon of Irresistible Offense
feats.summary: Crits add chosen ability score in damage; weapon attacks ignore resistance.

feats.label: Boon of Skill
feats.summary: Proficiency in all skills.

feats.label: Boon of Speed
feats.summary: +30 ft speed; bonus-action Disengage.

feats.label: Boon of Spell Recall
feats.summary: Cast a prepared spell of L4 or lower without expending a slot, PB times per long rest.

feats.label: Boon of Truesight
feats.summary: Truesight 60 ft.
